title: malva miniata
intro: Malva miniata, also known as the Mallow or Hollyhock Mallow, is a plant species in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and demulcent properties, which help to soothe and protect mucous membranes. The health benefits of Malva miniata include treating digestive issues, reducing coughs, and easing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Malva miniata can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and it can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to promote wound healing and skin health.
